items.prompt: How does this chapter define the main goal of EDA?
choices: Understand the data before formal modeling
items.explain: EDA emphasizes exploration and observation before confirmatory modeling.

choices: Basic statistics and visual relationships on a customer table
Deleting every missing row without review
items.explain: Example 6.1 reviews summaries then histograms/scatter plots.

items.prompt: EDA and cleaning from Chapter 5 can iterate: plots reveal issues, repairs restore explorable tables.
In one sentence, how does EDA relate to model choice?
items.rubric: EDA reveals patterns (linear/nonlinear, skew, quality) that inform model family selection.
items.sample_answer: EDA surfaces distribution shape and relationships that suggest appropriate model families.
